description: Frame toxic-release / dispersion scenarios — source term, release mode, receptors, and a consequence band — as structured input for a competent-person bowtie / LOPA / QRA study. It does NOT run quantitative dispersion modelling (no PHAST / ALOHA) and does NOT invent dispersion distances or concentrations; un-modelled values are recorded as [GAP] and the consequence side is developed with the bowtie-builder and lopa-worksheet. Use it to structure a release scenario, prepare dispersion input for a study, or frame the consequence side of a bowtie. Assistive decision-support: it structures the scenario for a competent team, never an autonomous quantitative result, which a competent person must produce and review.
name: toxic-release-dispersion-scenario
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
